notes: Running head matches. Body text itself appears correct, but multiple marginal line numbers and line-range markers were transcribed into the body. In the apparatus, the scan uses Latin N repeatedly where the transcription normalized to ℵ; one entry at II 1 is also assigned to the wrong witness.
